---
pagetitle: "Main Schedule"
---

::: grid
::: {#sponsors_banner .g-col-12 .title}
# Summary Schedule
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .full_text_block}

## Day 1 — Monday, 25 May 2026

| Time | Event | Title | Speakers |
|---|---|---|---|
| 10.00 - 10.30 | Opening Remarks | | Prof. Dra. Tuty Arisuryanti, M.Sc., Ph.D. |
| 10.30 - 11.30 | Guest Lecture 1 | Benefits and Challenges of Marine Spatial Planning for Small Indo-Pacific Islands and Their Socio-Ecosystems | Serge Andrefouet |
| 11.30 - 12.00 | Break | | |
| 12.00 - 15.00 | Regular Session 1 | 19 Student Presentations | — |
| 16.30 - 17.00 | IUP Session | 2 Student Presentations | — |
: {.table .table-striped .table-hover .schedule-table}

## Day 2 — Tuesday, 26 May 2026

| Time | Event | Title | Speakers |
|---|---|---|---|
| 13.00 - 15.00 | Regular Session 2 | 7 Student Presentations | — |
| 15.00 - 16.00 | Guest Lecture 2 | Large-Scale Biomanufacturing and Intelligent Synthetic Biology | Zhijie Yang |
| 16.00 - 16:45 | Regular Session 3 | 3 Student Presentations | — |
: {.table .table-striped .table-hover .schedule-table}

:::
:::
